name: Premier Technology Public Company Limited
summary: Premier Technology Public Company Limited, through its subsidiary, Datapro Computer Systems Company Limited, distributes and provides services relating to computer and computer systems in Thailand. It develops its own products; and distributes products of other companies. The company's products include hardware and software products, including IT and multimedia products; and system and data management, and application software. It also offers annual maintenance, training and consulting, outsourcing, and other services; and engages in the rental of an office building. The company was formerly known as Premier Engineering and Technology Public Company Limited and changed its name to Premier Technology Public Company Limited in October 2006. Premier Technology Public Company Limited was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
